title: Microwave Signal Generation
description: Master the techniques for generating precise microwave signals to control superconducting qubits. Learn about local oscillators, IQ modulation, direct digital synthesis, and the critical specifications that determine gate fidelity.
learningObjectives: Explain IQ modulation and its application to qubit control
Design microwave signal chains for qubit drive and readout
Calculate phase noise requirements and their impact on gate fidelity
Implement sideband modulation and DRAG pulse techniques
